title: ItemFrames+
description: Makes item frames more useful by shrinking hitboxes and making them invisible.
body:
Requires Fabric-Api

# ItemFrames+

![GitHub license](https://img.shields.io/github/license/kryparnold/item-frames-plus.svg)
![GitHub release](https://img.shields.io/github/release/kryparnold/item-frames-plus.svg)
![GitHub issues](https://img.shields.io/github/issues/kryparnold/item-frames-plus.svg)

Minecraft Fabric Mod makes item frames more useful by shrinking hitboxes and making them invisible.

# Usage
- Shift and Right Click to any item frame to make it invisible.
- Since the Invisible Item Frame feature is server-side, you can always disable it on the client-side by typing /itemframesplus invisibleItemFrames false.
